Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribbution
Off Calendar Oct-01-2012 Off Calendar

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribbution
Off Calendar Jul-30-2012 Continued To Oct-01-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Epstein for Rudolph Gray. Donald Lawson for and with Lisa Vaughn.

Mr. Epstein reported that they spoke and talked about doing some discovery, and putting the matter out to October. The Petition for Determination of Entitlement to Estate Distribution was continued to October 1, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court explained that it has no stated basis from either side to support their positions.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Petition For Full Authority Under The Independent Administration Of Estates Act
Off Calendar Feb-23-2012 Advanced From Apr-17-12 To Mar-19-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Additional Bond And Issuance Of The Amended Letters
Off Calendar Apr-16-2012 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Additional Bond And Issuance Of The Amended Letters
Off Calendar Apr-09-2012 Continued To Apr-16-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Full Authority Under The Independent Administration Of Estates Act
Off Calendar Mar-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Espstein for Rudolph Gray. Lisa Vaughn in Propria Persona. Howard Scheiman Real Estate Broker also present.

The Court granted the Petition for Full Authority Under The Independent Administration of Estates Act (subject to review of the order). Total bond in the amount of $2,000,000.00 is required. The current bond on file is in the amount of $460,000.00.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-14-2011 Granted Per Written Order
